---
title: "Your Title"
subtitle: "A chapter presentation"
author: "Your Name"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  xaringan::moon_reader:
    css: ["default", "rladies-plus.css", "rladies-plus-fonts.css"]
    lib_dir: libs
    nature:
      highlightStyle: github
      highlightLines: true
      countIncrementalSlides: false
      ratio: "16:9"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
options(htmltools.dir.version = FALSE)
library(ggplot2)
library(spellbind)
```

class: inverse, center, middle

# Welcome to RLadies+

---

## Getting Started

- Point one
- Point two
- Point three

---

## Plot Example

```{r plot-example, fig.width=10, fig.height=5, dpi=150}
ggplot(mtcars, aes(wt, mpg)) +
  geom_point(colour = rladies_cols("purple"), size = 3) +
  labs(
    title = "Weight vs Fuel Efficiency",
    x = "Weight (1000 lbs)",
    y = "Miles per Gallon"
  ) +
  theme_rladies()
```

---

class: inverse, center, middle

# Thank you!

[rladies.org](https://rladies.org)
